query:
SELECT 
  guiaNumero, 
  numeroLote, 
  sequencialTransacao, 
  pacienteNome,
  DATE(dataExecucao) as dataExec,
  COUNT(*) as totalItens,
  SUM(CAST(valorFaturado AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as valorTotal
FROM procedimentos 
WHERE guiaNumero = '65811869' 
GROUP BY guiaNumero, numeroLote, sequencialTransacao, pacienteNome, DATE(dataExecucao)
ORDER BY dataExec, pacienteNome
LIMIT 20;
